description: Darjeeling, nestled in the foothills of the Himalayas, is one of India’s most charming hill destinations. Famous for its emerald tea gardens, snow-capped mountain views and the iconic Toy Train, Darjeeling offers a calm yet breathtaking travel experience. Watching the sunrise at Tiger Hill with the golden rays touching Mt. Kanchenjunga is a moment that stays in your heart forever. The cool climate, colonial-era architecture, monasteries, local cafés, Tibetan markets and scenic ropeway rides make every day here special. Whether you’re looking for nature, romance or adventure — Darjeeling is a perfect hill retreat that refreshes your mind and soul.

faqs.title: 1) Best time to visit Darjeeling?
faqs.content: March to May and October to December are the best seasons — clear skies & perfect mountain views.

faqs.title: 2) What are the must-visit places?
faqs.content: Tiger Hill sunrise, Batasia Loop, Darjeeling Himalayan Railway (Toy Train), Tea Gardens, Mall Road, Ropeway, Peace Pagoda.

faqs.title: 3) What type of weather can we expect?
faqs.content: Pleasant cold throughout the year; winters can be extremely chilly.

faqs.title: 4) Is local transport included?
faqs.content: Local sightseeing will be arranged as per itinerary with private vehicle.
